name: Crab-Apple Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the crab-apples and do not pare them.
2. Remove stems and blossom ends, then cut into halves.
3. Remove seeds.
4. Cover with water and cook until soft.
5. Drain through a jelly bag.
6. Use 2/3 cup sugar for each cup of juice.
7. Boil rapidly until the jelly sheets form when a spoon is lifted.
